reviews.review_description: FREAKY LAB VR is a weird and fun sandbox where you can just mess around and experiment. Lots of freedom, smooth interactions, and a very unique vibe. Perfect if you want something different and just have fun in VR. Highly recommended!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! 🙌
We’re really happy you’re enjoying the freedom, smooth interactions, and that weird Freaky Lab vibe 😄 That “just mess around and have fun” feeling is exactly what we wanted to create. Thanks a lot for the recommendation—it means a ton to us! 🧪🧠

reviews.review_description: This game is seriously freaky :D  Engrossing gameplay that will keep you hooked for a long time. Surprising and funny ideas. It's definitely worth a laugh. Definitely worth playing! It's a lot of fun, especially on weekend evenings with friends!

developer_response.body:
Wow, thank you! 🤩
We love hearing that the game hooked you and gave you some good laughs—that’s exactly what we hoped for with the freaky ideas and surprises. Playing with friends on the weekend sounds like the perfect way to enjoy it 😄 Thanks a ton for the awesome recommendation!

reviews.review_description: Bro I buy it I test it out and the only thing I could do is turn the person into a horse I think I'm doing it wrong? 😭😭😭 But it is pretty cool

So much fun! Is total chaos in the lab – weird experiments and lots of laughs. Colorful, funny, and super engaging. VR fun at its best, highly recommend for anyone who just wants to mess around! <3 <3 <3

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words and 5 stars!!! Have a great time!!! This is just the beginning!!! Cheers, VRF Team

reviews.review_description: Freaky Lab VR is creepy, chaotic and ridiculously fun 😜 I screamed, laughed and still want more. Totally worth it!

developer_response.body:
Hi Wika,

Haha, glad you’re loving it! 😆 Freaky Lab VR really knows how to mix the scares with laughs. Can’t blame you for wanting more—once you start, it’s impossible to stop! 🎮

~VR Factory

reviews.review_description: Freaky Lab VR has a lot of progression, with new experiments unlocking as you play. The game runs smoothly and the colorful visuals fit the crazy lab theme really well.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the kind words! 🙌
We’re really happy you’re enjoying the progression and discovering new experiments as you play. Smooth performance and colorful, chaotic lab vibes were a big focus for us, so it’s great to hear that resonated. More fun experiments are coming—stay tuned! 🧪😄

~VR Factory

Thanks so much! 😄 So glad you’re loving the freaky chaos! Keep having a blast in the lab! 🧪💥

~VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description: tons of fun, very chaotic, would recommend

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much! 😄
We’re glad you’re having fun and enjoying the chaos—that’s exactly the energy we were going for. Appreciate the recommendation a ton! 🙌

~VR Factory

reviews.review_description: Dude its just weird and creative!

developer_response.body:
Thanks! 🙌

“Weird and creative” is a combo we actually like 😄
We love pushing things a bit outside the usual patterns. Appreciate the feedback! 🚀

~VRF Team
